article_meta.title: President Donald Trump said Wednesday he wants negotiations to acquire Greenland, portraying the effort as a strategic n

reasoning: The summary largely paraphrases Trump’s statements with attribution and avoids adopting loaded or emotive framing as fact. It softens or attributes charged language (e.g., “ungrateful” as Trump’s accusation) and sticks to descriptive verbs. Minor phrasing like “rising tensions” is mildly interpretive but not systematic.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (e.g., “said,” “criticized,” “argued”); slight interpretive “rising tensions” but minimal.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Most contentious points are attributed to Trump (e.g., spending claim, strategic rationale).
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Subjective judgments (e.g., ‘ungrateful,’ ‘mistake’) are clearly presented as Trump’s views.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No alarmist tone; phrasing is measured. ‘Threatened tariffs’ reflects the article’s factual claim.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s own voice; derogatory terms are attributed to Trump.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about motives beyond what Trump stated.
custom_reasoning.slant: Focuses on Trump’s perspective, matching the article; no undue emphasis beyond source balance.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: No significant perspectives present in the article are omitted in the summary.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives are factual or attributed; avoids value-laden descriptors.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically neutral vocabulary; avoids charged labels.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Mentions tensions and threats proportionally to the article without amplifying negativity.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential deference; accurately relays official remarks.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Clearly more neutral than the source’s framing by attributing claims and avoiding loaded quotes.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Represents the article’s sole perspective (Trump’s) proportionally; no missing counter-perspectives from the source.
